reference_postmortem: A recent inventory-service release changed the liveness probe path from /healthz to /nonexistent-probe. Kubelet restarts every pod after 3 failures, masking the real symptom as intermittent 502s at the ingress. The inventory service itself is healthy — only the probe is wrong. Mitigation: rollback inventory-service to the previous revision. Follow-up: gate probe-path changes behind a canary + synthetic health check.
